description: A payment processing system in the 'payment-platform' project is currently tightly coupled to a concrete implementation. Decouple the system using the 'Extract Interface' refactoring. Extract a new interface named 'PaymentGateway' from 'StripeService.java' containing the business methods 'charge', 'refund', and 'verifyCard', ensuring 'StripeService' implements the interface and 'connectToStripeAPI' remains private. Refactor 'CheckoutService.java' to depend on the 'PaymentGateway' interface instead of the concrete 'StripeService' class.
